title: FOI2025-00220: ChatGPT history of ministers using government emails
body: "   Reference number FOI2025-00220   Date of request 17 March 2025   Date of response 10 April 2025   Outcome No information held     The Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (the department) received the following request for information which we responded to under the Freedom of Information Act 2000 (FOIA):    Copies of transcripts from conversations ministers have had with ChatGPT using government email accounts from 01 December 2024 to 17 March 2025.    "
